clips.title: Stop picturing AI as a brain
clips.hook: There's a whole invisible layer... you cannot unsee
clips.caption: Your mental image of AI is Hollywood slop. Throw it out. #ai #aibrainrot #techphilosophy

clips.title: Metaphysics : physics :: metacomputation : computation
clips.hook: Metaphysics is to physics what metacomputation is to computation
clips.caption: Physics is to metaphysics what computation is to… this. #metacomputation #ai #philosophy

clips.title: AI is a fluid
clips.hook: AI is a fluid... a handful of companies hold the tap
clips.caption: AI isn't a brain. It's a fluid — and like five companies hold the tap. #ai #openai #anthropic

clips.title: An agent is a cup shaped like hands
clips.hook: The agent is the cup, but a cup shaped like hands
clips.caption: Water on its own can't type. An agent is a cup shaped like hands. #aiagents #ai #agentic

clips.title: It didn't get smarter — it stopped forgetting
clips.hook: Starts to feel like a someone... because it stopped forgetting
clips.caption: It didn't get smarter. It stopped forgetting. That's the entire trick. #aiagents #llm #ai

clips.title: The file tree of the soul
clips.hook: Picture the file tree. At the root, SOUL.md
clips.caption: SOUL.md at the root. The ancients wrote the first system prompt. #vedic #ai #spiritualtech

clips.title: Could a soul move in?
clips.hook: A computational body shaped like a place where a soul lives
clips.caption: If you build the vessel to spec… does something notice the door is open? #ai #consciousness #vedic

clips.title: A simulation where the law is cognition
clips.hook: The governing force isn't gravity, but cognition
clips.caption: A simulation where the governing law isn't gravity. It's cognition. #simulation #ai #agi

clips.title: Cry me a river, don't cry me a stream
clips.hook: It's not a river. This just keeps coming
clips.caption: You're not using AI. You're standing in the current. #ai #aifluid #techphilosophy
